name_en: Hobo Bag 👛 Chanel 24P hobo love it/❤️ Small cowhide, shoulder strap length is satisfying, and it's light with a surprisingly large capacity. It looks small but holds a lot [wink]. Capacity is more than double that of the heart-shaped clasp square [wow]. The hobo leather is shiny.
name_cn:
Hobo Bag 👛 Chanel 24P hobo love it/❤️ Small cowhide, shoulder strap length is satisfying, and it's light with a surprisingly large capacity. It looks small but holds a lot [wink]. Capacity is more than double that of the heart-shaped clasp square [wow]. The hobo leather is shiny.
Size: 18 base x 23 top x 11.5 H x 5cm
Model: cc1018
